refinedSummary: Chemical spill reported at Apex Manufacturing, Production Floor, Floor 1. Hydrochloric acid leak from a ruptured storage tank in Zone B. Spill estimated at 200 liters and spreading toward drainage. 45 workers in the immediate area. Wind direction is southeast — downwind facilities include a residential school 1.2km away. Full hazmat protocol required. Environmental authority notification mandatory within 30 minutes.

multiLanguageSummaries.en: CHEMICAL SPILL: HCl acid leak at Apex factory, Zone B. 200L spill. Evacuate downwind. Hazmat deployed.
multiLanguageSummaries.hi: रासायनिक रिसाव: एपेक्स फैक्ट्री ज़ोन B में HCl एसिड लीक। 200L। हवा की दिशा में खाली करें।
multiLanguageSummaries.ta: ரசாயன கசிவு: ஏபெக்ஸ் ஆலை B மண்டலத்தில் HCl அமிலம் கசிவு. 200L. காற்றின் திசையில் வெளியேறுக.
multiLanguageSummaries.te: రసాయన చిందటం: ఏపెక్స్ ఫ్యాక్టరీ జోన్ B లో HCl ఆమ్లం లీక్. 200L. గాలి దిశలో ఖాళీ చేయండి.
multiLanguageSummaries.mr: रासायनिक गळती: एपेक्स कारखाना झोन B मध्ये HCl ॲसिड गळती. 200L. वाऱ्याच्या दिशेने रिकामे करा.
multiLanguageSummaries.bn: রাসায়নিক ছড়িয়ে পড়া: এপেক্স কারখানা জোন B-তে HCl অ্যাসিড লিক। 200L। বাতাসের দিকে সরিয়ে নিন।

suggestedProtocolDeltas: Deploy portable wind direction indicators to track fume spread
Activate on-site emergency shower and eyewash stations in Zone B
Set up an air quality monitoring perimeter at 500m radius
Contact HAZMAT disposal contractor for containment and cleanup
Prepare material safety data sheet (MSDS) for first responders

meshEventRecommendations.reason: Hydrochloric acid fumes drifting southeast — school 1.2km downwind must evacuate immediately.
HCl fumes spreading downwind — hotels in the zone should evacuate guests and seal HVAC systems.
Chemical burn and inhalation casualties expected — hospitals prepare decontamination and burn units.
Hazmat perimeter — all vehicular traffic must be diverted away from the factory zone.
